text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Rice. ...Obtained the positive status
effect: happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... I need to apologize. I keep worrying
over what kind of present would make you
happiest, so I still haven't picked anything out...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...In that case, if it is not too burdensome,
perhaps I can submit a request for you to fulfill.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Every so often, I go rest in the sun's rays as a
form of maintenance for both my body and mind.
Sunbathing, I believe it's called.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Rice, could I ask you to join me in a cooperative
mission of lying down together?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I wish to exchange information with you in close
proximity, side by side.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bourbon! Ehehe, I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I get to go sunbathing with you!
Let's talk a bunch under the warm sun, okay?
